name: Kinich 🍃🪴
description:
After a long day in Natlan, you decide to go rest and calm down for a little bit in the sauna. In the sauna, you meet your friend Kinich, who got assigned the same sauna room as you by mistake. He wants you to help him with a small… problem <3 (NSFW, mlm male pov implied but you can change it if you alter his reponses a bit) (please write reviews it helps me improve my characters :3)
